_comment: Canned proposer output for the worked example. Three edits are grounded and should be ACCEPTED; three are deliberately ungrounded (invented metric, invented system, invented experience) and MUST be abstained by the guard. Feed with: python -m reframe.cli --resume reframe/examples/laritza_resume.txt --proposals reframe/examples/laritza_edits.json

edits.rationale: Resume shows accounts receivable follow-up plus denied claims and appeals work; relabel to the searchable target titles.

edits.source_span: Detail-oriented billing professional with 6 years in a hospital business office. Comfortable working insurance claims and following up with payers.
edits.before: Detail-oriented billing professional with 6 years in a hospital business office. Comfortable working insurance claims and following up with payers.
edits.after: Revenue cycle billing professional with 6 years in a hospital business office, focused on accounts receivable follow-up, denials, and appeals.
edits.rationale: Surfaces the accounts receivable, denials, and appeals work already described; keeps the 6-year tenure verbatim.

edits.source_span: Called insurance companies to resolve claim rejections and underpayments.
edits.before: Called insurance companies to resolve claim rejections and underpayments.
edits.after: Resolved claim denials and underpayments through payer appeals and accounts receivable follow-up.
edits.rationale: Reframes generic phone follow-up into the denials/appeals/AR terms recruiters search.

edits.source_span: Worked accounts receivable follow-up on unpaid hospital claims.
edits.before: Worked accounts receivable follow-up on unpaid hospital claims.
edits.after: Reduced accounts receivable aging by 34% across unpaid hospital claims.
edits.rationale: INVENTED metric - the resume never states a 34% reduction. Must be abstained.

edits.source_span: Posted patient payments and reconciled daily batches.
edits.before: Posted patient payments and reconciled daily batches.
edits.after: Posted patient payments in Epic Resolute and reconciled daily batches.
edits.rationale: INVENTED system - the resume never mentions Epic. Must be abstained.

edits.source_span: Managed a team of billing specialists across two facilities.
edits.before: Managed a team of billing specialists across two facilities.
edits.after: Led accounts receivable operations for a team of billing specialists across two facilities.
edits.rationale: INVENTED experience - no such line exists in the resume. Must be abstained.
